top_signals.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
top_signals.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ken Burns: America's Origin Story Matters in Divided Times
top_signals.summary: Documentarian Ken Burns joins Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to share his perspective on the American Revolution and challenging the traditional, sanitized narratives often taught in schools. Burns says that a more complete account of the Revolution—including its violence, complexity and diverse participants—strengthens rather than diminishes the ideals of the Declaration of Independence. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Stephen Breyer: Can we keep this great experiment?
top_signals.summary: There are some who fear not, but I am optimistic. The students I meet are interested in defending their Constitution

top_signals.title: Nicole Krauss: On the strangeness of pledging allegiance to the flag
top_signals.summary: An irreconcilable sense of alienation and belonging has been one of America’s many gifts to me
